member.name: M:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories.Interfaces.IInvitationRepository.FindPendingByTokenHashAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Finds a Pending, non-expired invitation by its SHA-256 token hash. Includes the navigation property. Returns null when no matching invitation exists, or when it is expired or in any status other than Pending.

member.name: M:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories.Interfaces.IInvitationRepository.ClaimWithNewUserAsync(FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invitation,FSBS.Domain.Entities.AppUser,FSBS.Domain.Entities.UserProfile,FSBS.Domain.Entities.OrgMembership,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Atomically marks the invitation as Claimed and persists the new , , and in a single SaveChanges call.
